warm_up:
Push Press Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
10 Scap Pull Up
10 Plate I Y T
10 Plate Shoulder Press
10 Squat Jump
15 Calf Raise
If catching up, talk to the coach for a warm up relevant to your movement

hypertrophy.reasoning: Push press and rowing heavily tax shoulders, quads, and core; accessory work targets posterior chain and pulling musculature for balance.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Push Press, 1 by 1 at 95 percent. Metcon: 2k Row. Workout. For hypertrophy, focus on back, hamstrings, biceps.
